scope: Fixture-first QA for the pr-review-watch helper, skill registry, feature registry, and ticket metadata.

commands.summary: Ran 13 tests covering clean pass, failed checks, gh bucket fail checks, unresolved comments, pending checks, missing auth, no active PR, missing config, CLI JSON output, project config precedence, and invalid interval/boolean rejection.
Skill checklist sections OK; registry OK with 79 skill rows; todo tier check OK; skill capability fixtures OK.
Ticket metadata OK with 28 ticket files checked.
Fixture classified as actionable with a gh bucket-style failing check converted into an ActionableReviewItem.

commands.command: rg -n "pr-review-watch|PR review watch|PR watcher|pull request.*watch" AGENTS.md templates/global/AGENTS.md
commands.summary: No root or global AGENTS watcher policy was added; command exited 1 because it found no matches.

notes: Live GitHub polling remains integration behavior and was not used for unit proof.
The required skill-maintenance generator also reflected a pre-existing untracked eval-onboarding skill in docs/skills/registry.jsonl.
